title: Senior Java / Spring Developer
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: Join our team in Aix-en-Provence as a Senior Java / Spring Developer. You are the technical lead of the project and support developers in upskilling.
mission.1: Concevoir et développer des applications Java Spring Boot
mission.2: Définir et faire respecter les standards techniques
mission.4: Mettre en place les pipelines CI/CD
mission.6: Accompagner et mentorer les développeurs juniors
profile.2: 5 à 9 years of experience Java / Spring
profile.3: Expert Spring Boot, Microservices, JPA, Kafka
